title: Stationary Random Processes
description: Random processes as families of random variables indexed by time, strict-sense and wide-sense stationarity, ergodicity, and the autocorrelation function.
objectives: Define a random process as an indexed family of random variables, and distinguish ensemble statistics from time statistics
State the strict-sense and wide-sense definitions of stationarity, and explain why WSS does not generally imply SSS
Explain ergodicity and why it is required to justify estimating ensemble statistics from a single realization
State and apply the key properties of the autocorrelation function for a real WSS process
